blocks.content: Eli materialized at Kit's shoulder with a level of subtlety that was not Eli's natural mode.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Can I say something.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You're going to.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Tonight's the night.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Eli —

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Not a question. Not a suggestion. A statement of fact.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You don't know that.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I set up this entire field for this night. I have been planning since February. I put the lanterns at a specific height for good ambience. I know.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You planned this field for your Fourth of July event.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I planned this field for your moment. The Fourth of July is the occasion.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: You are unbelievable.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I am extremely consistent. There is a difference.
Kit looked at him.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: The lanterns.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: The lanterns.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Eli.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: A man is allowed to curate the environment. Does Meilin know? Meilin helped me pick the color. Warm white. Neutral white is too harsh.
Kit laughed and shook his head.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: You've been waiting long enough. She has too. Stop overthinking it and just let it happen.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I'm not overthinking it.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: You think about things approximately four times longer than necessary. Always have.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: That's fair.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Go be with her. The rest of it will happen when it happens.
He clapped Kit once on the back and walked away like a man who had done his job.
